title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 15 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 15 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 15 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.43% today, the main contract closed at 815.5. The traders' willingness to ship is general. The steel mills are not activeto purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
